title: Xtra Tangy Russian Fish Noodles
description: A tangy and chewy Russian dish featuring fish sauce and a soffritto base, this recipe is a quick fix for a delicious meal. It is halal friendly and can be prepared in under 30 minutes.

ingredients.name: Fish sauce
ingredients.notes: Make sure it is halal certified

ingredients.name: Noodles
ingredients.notes: Choose a chewy type like udon or soba

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion, carrot, and celery and cook until they are softened.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the fish sauce, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and let it cook for 2 minutes.
Add the noodles to the pan and toss them in the sauce until they are well coated.
Reduce the heat to low and let the noodles cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Serve the noodles hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
